question_intent: average royalty percentage for authors who have written titles published by publishers in California and have a royalty percentage greater than 50

plan.question_intent: average royalty percentage for authors who have written titles published by publishers in California and have a royalty percentage greater than 50
plan.detail_query: SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper FROM authors a JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id JOIN sales sa ON t.title_id = sa.title_id WHERE p.state = 'CA' AND ta.royaltyper > 50 GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper HAVING COUNT(s.stor_id) > 0

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
join_clauses: JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper

steps.clause: JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
steps.sql:

FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id

JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA')
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 50)
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 50)
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
HAVING (COUNT(s.stor_id) > 0)

build_logs.notes: average royalty percentage for authors meeting the criteria

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 50)
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
HAVING (COUNT(s.stor_id) > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

preview.title: Cooking with Computers: Surreptitious Balance Sheets

steps.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper) AS avg_royalty_percentage
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id = s.stor_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 50)
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title, t.ytd_sales, ta.royaltyper
HAVING (COUNT(s.stor_id) > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper) AS avg_royalty_percentage
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper, t.title, t.ytd_sales, s.city, s.state
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id IN (SELECT stor_id FROM sales WHERE title_id IN (SELECT title_id FROM titleauthor WHERE au_id = a.au_id))
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 50)
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper, t.title, t.ytd_sales, s.city, s.state
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT t.title_id) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper) AS avg_royalty_percentage
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper, t.title, t.ytd_sales, s.city, s.state
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN stores s ON s.stor_id IN (SELECT stor_id FROM sales WHERE title_id IN (SELECT title_id FROM titleauthor WHERE au_id = a.au_id))
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 50)
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper, t.title, t.ytd_sales, s.city, s.state
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT t.title_id) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average royalty percentage for authors who have at least one book published by a California publisher with a royalty rate greater than 50%?
